title: Solar cell plants owned by the city of Malmö, electricity production (kWh) (Malmö stad)
description:
[Publisher: Malmö stad] The city of Malmö has solar cell systems on many of its buildings in the city,
for example at schools, retirement homes, museums and administrative offices.

This dataset contains:  
\- Solar cell systems owned by the city of Malmö.  
\- Electricity produced in kilowatt hours from the solar cell systems. Divided
by month, per system and hour.

**Attributes in resource Solar cell systems**

  * `Id [anläggnings-id]`
  * `Name [populärnamn på anläggningen]`
  * `ModuleArea [sammanlagd solpanelyta i kvadratmeter]`
  * `StartupDate [installationsdatum]`
  * `PanelCount [totalt antal solpaneler i anläggningen]`
  * `PanelType [typ av solpanel]`
  * `Enabled [aktiverad]`
  * `MaxDisplayValue [installerad effekt (kWp)]`
  * `Address [anläggningens placering, postadress]`
  * `geometry [anläggningens placering, typ: Point, CRS: WGS84]`

A value of 0 or -1 can occur for PanelCount. This means that data is missing.

**Attributes in resource Electricity generation**

  * `Id [anläggnings-id]`
  * `AggregationType [aggregationsgranularitet]`
  * `ProductionData`  
\- `StartDate [datum och heltimme]`  
\- `Produced [producerad el i kWh sedan närmast föregående heltimme]`

During the spring of 2025, an adjustment was made to the IDs of a number of
facilities.  
The following table shows the old and new IDs for the affected facilities:  
`1005_A_AS1_SOL_E1 --> 1005_A_AS1_6390_ELM1_E1`  
`1063_F_SOL_E1 --> 1063_F_6390_ELM1_E1`  
`1601_A_AS3_ELM_SOL_E1 --> 1601_A_6390_ELM1_E1`  
`1719_B_AS1_SOL_BYA_E1 --> 1719_A_AS1_6390_ELM1_E1`  
`1719_B_AS1_SOL_BYB_E1 --> 1719_B_AS1_6390_ELM1_E1`  
`1896_A_A1EE_SOLPANEL_E1 --> 1896_A_6390_ELM1_E1`  
`1906_A_6390_EM1_E1 --> 1906_A_6390_ELM1_E1`
